title: geranium solanderi
intro: Geranium solanderi, also known as the Solander's geranium or New Zealand hardy geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is a hardy, low-maintenance perennial native to New Zealand, valued for its medicinal and herbal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and menstrual cramps, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. Geranium solanderi can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to offer health benefits including reduced anxiety and improved immune function.
